vibe: SoFi meets Mercury meets The Browser Company. Premium, trustworthy, editorial fintech. High contrast emerald/warm-cream palette with expressive typography.

rules.h1: font-serif text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-[1.05] text-primary
rules.oversized_numerals: font-sans text-5xl sm:text-7xl font-black text-border/60 tracking-tighter
rules.labels: font-sans uppercase text-[10px] sm:text-xs tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-text_secondary

layout_spacing.grid: Bento Grid Mode A - Asymmetric, wide gaps (gap-8), optical alignment over strict geometric alignment.

surface_strategies.navigation: Crystal Glass: bg-[#F7F6F2]/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-border shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (surface), 1px solid border-border, no shadow by default. Hover: shadow-xl -translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300.
surface_strategies.live_widget: Neumorphic / High-Contrast: Deep Emerald background with glowing Accent Gold/Green APY text.

hero.layout: Asymmetric split. Left: Editorial heading + primary CTA + trust badges. Right: Staggered, overlapping 3D-feeling product cards using framer-motion.
hero.live_apy_widget: Floating element in hero displaying a live-updating APY number (e.g., 5.00%). Use framer-motion for counting/slot-machine effect.

marquee.style: The 'Editorial Ribbon'. Pale background, high contrast dark logos, massive gap-32, slow drift using react-fast-marquee.

segmented_controls.style: Tabbed navigation for Checking/Savings, Budgeting/Finance. Pill-shaped container, sliding active background indicator.

account_rows.style: List view for comparison. Left column features massive numeral (01, 02). Middle: Bank info, bullets, badges. Right: CTA. Add a subtle bottom border between rows.

product_detail_page.layout: Editorial layout. Large hero graphic/abstract image. 'Bento' grid for Pros/Cons. Oversized pull-quotes for 'Who it's for'. FAQ accordions.

forms.style: EmailJS integration. Use large, airy inputs with solid background (#F7F6F2) and thin border. Floating labels if possible, or bold small caps labels. Button should be prominent.

interactions: Hover states on all cards: gentle lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
Staggered entrance for list rows (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0).
Live APY data motion: blur-in or slot-machine style vertical counting animation.

assets.icons: lucide-react and react-icons (for brand logos via simple-icons).

hero_abstract.description: Green and gold abstract background for hero or detail pages

campus_lifestyle_1.description: Two women sit at a table outside, good for 'Student Life' sections

campus_lifestyle_2.description: Students walking on a path in a park

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Deep emerald text on warm sand is highly accessible.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid="compare-cta-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI (using purely React/Tailwind where Shadcn is too rigid for marketing).
Set up global fonts: `Playfair Display` (serif) and `Outfit` (sans).
Build out the Home page, Compare/List views, Detailed Product Pages (dynamic routes if possible, or individual static components), and Legal/Contact pages.
Use standard `react-icons/si` for bank logos where possible, or construct clean text logos. Do NOT use placeholder image URLs.
Integrate the Contact Form using EmailJS logic (mocked or pre-configured).
Apply `data-testid` to all CTAs, tabs, form inputs, and accordion triggers.
